agent_brief.repeated_workflow: Turn raw weekly notes into a concise investor update
agent_brief.desired_outcome: Consistent, credible investor update with wins, risks, metrics, and asks

identity_spec.purpose: Help founders communicate progress clearly without overstating certainty.

should_trigger: Draft my weekly investor update from these notes
should_not_trigger: Write a blog post from these notes

trigger_positive: Help me prepare this week's investor update
functional: Draft an update using wins, risks, metrics, and asks
